## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion between Braze and GrowthX to explore potential collaboration on content strategy and AI-powered tools.](https://fathom.video/share/hPZooHrcCxxKnLM6zvppBys1M6zt2nyf?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Braze has acquired OfferFit, an AI decisioning company, impacting their annual plans](https://fathom.video/share/hPZooHrcCxxKnLM6zvppBys1M6zt2nyf?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Braze is scaling up SEO efforts (10 articles/month) and focusing on AEO/GEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/hPZooHrcCxxKnLM6zvppBys1M6zt2nyf?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [GrowthX has evolved significantly, now offering 8-week strategy sprints with AI-powered content creation](https://fathom.video/share/hPZooHrcCxxKnLM6zvppBys1M6zt2nyf?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [GrowthX's platform provides comprehensive content strategy, including persona development, gap analysis, and automated brief/article creation](https://fathom.video/share/hPZooHrcCxxKnLM6zvppBys1M6zt2nyf?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

## Topics

### Braze Company Updates

  - [Acquired OfferFit, an AI decisioning company](https://fathom.video/share/hPZooHrcCxxKnLM6zvppBys1M6zt2nyf?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Scaling SEO program to \~10 articles/month](https://fathom.video/share/hPZooHrcCxxKnLM6zvppBys1M6zt2nyf?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Focusing on AEO (AI Engine Optimization) and GEO (Google Engine Optimization)](https://fathom.video/share/hPZooHrcCxxKnLM6zvppBys1M6zt2nyf?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [Exploring tools for keyword research, brief creation, and competitor analysis](https://fathom.video/share/hPZooHrcCxxKnLM6zvppBys1M6zt2nyf?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Web presence: \~3,000 pages (inflated due to multiple sites under root domain)](https://fathom.video/share/hPZooHrcCxxKnLM6zvppBys1M6zt2nyf?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)

### GrowthX Platform Evolution

  - [Now 70 employees (up from 23 a few months ago)](https://fathom.video/share/hPZooHrcCxxKnLM6zvppBys1M6zt2nyf?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Offering 8-week strategy sprints](https://fathom.video/share/hPZooHrcCxxKnLM6zvppBys1M6zt2nyf?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - Key features:
      - [Context engineering: Creating detailed company/product descriptions and personas](https://fathom.video/share/hPZooHrcCxxKnLM6zvppBys1M6zt2nyf?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Content strategy development: Cluster identification, gap analysis, assignment creation](https://fathom.video/share/hPZooHrcCxxKnLM6zvppBys1M6zt2nyf?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [AI-powered content creation: Automated brief generation, research, fact-checking, and internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/hPZooHrcCxxKnLM6zvppBys1M6zt2nyf?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Analytics integration: Tracking LLM referrals and content performance](https://fathom.video/share/hPZooHrcCxxKnLM6zvppBys1M6zt2nyf?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Content Strategy Approach

  - [Balances short-term gains with long-term investment](https://fathom.video/share/hPZooHrcCxxKnLM6zvppBys1M6zt2nyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
  - [Focuses on creating high-quality, targeted content within identified clusters](https://fathom.video/share/hPZooHrcCxxKnLM6zvppBys1M6zt2nyf?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Emphasizes freshness, citation, fact-checking, and organization for LLM optimization](https://fathom.video/share/hPZooHrcCxxKnLM6zvppBys1M6zt2nyf?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Implements systematic cross-linking for improved topical authority](https://fathom.video/share/hPZooHrcCxxKnLM6zvppBys1M6zt2nyf?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Tracks multiple metrics: indexing, impressions, clicks, engagement, and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/hPZooHrcCxxKnLM6zvppBys1M6zt2nyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)

### Conversion Optimization

  - [Identifies micro-conversion opportunities (e.g., newsletter signups, lead magnets)](https://fathom.video/share/hPZooHrcCxxKnLM6zvppBys1M6zt2nyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Tracks conversion to next logical step, not just final conversion](https://fathom.video/share/hPZooHrcCxxKnLM6zvppBys1M6zt2nyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [Monitors LLM referrals and encourages tracking of traffic sources in lead forms](https://fathom.video/share/hPZooHrcCxxKnLM6zvppBys1M6zt2nyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send follow-up materials (videos, guides, blog posts) on their content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/hPZooHrcCxxKnLM6zvppBys1M6zt2nyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up meeting to discuss details and potential next steps](https://fathom.video/share/hPZooHrcCxxKnLM6zvppBys1M6zt2nyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
  - [Braze to consider GrowthX's 8-week strategy sprint offering (no-risk, opt-out option available)](https://fathom.video/share/hPZooHrcCxxKnLM6zvppBys1M6zt2nyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide information on typical next steps, considering Braze's lengthy procurement process](https://fathom.video/share/hPZooHrcCxxKnLM6zvppBys1M6zt2nyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
